title: Love Passion
desc: The debut album capturing every shade of love from girl view.

title: Echo Diary
desc: A diary written in echoes — memories that keep answering back long after the moment has passed.

title: Midnight Signal
desc: A midnight signal sent to everyone still awake, in a city that never sleeps.

desc: Songs that live between the written word and the breath that carries it.
